description: You are a royalty accountant for an independent music label. Open the Q3 statement at '/home/ga/Documents/royalty_statement_Q3.xlsx' and reconcile the royalty data. In the 'Streaming_Data' sheet, add columns for 'Artist_Royalty_Rate' (sourced from the 'Contracts' sheet) and 'Gross_Royalty' (Total_Revenue multiplied by the rate). Create a new sheet named 'Payout_Summary' with a table starting at A1 containing the headers: Artist, Total_Gross_Royalty, Unrecouped_Advance, Net_Payable, and Remaining_Advance. Aggregate the total gross royalties per artist and incorporate their advances from the 'Contracts' sheet. Net_Payable should be the gross royalty minus the advance (minimum $0), and Remaining_Advance should be the advance minus the gross royalty (minimum $0). Apply currency formatting to all monetary values and save the workbook.
